summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Travelio v4.0 WhatsApp-only conversational travel booking agent. All specified features working excellently (100% success rate). Autonomous flight categorization, Travelio pricing rules, EUR to XOF conversion, session management, and PDF ticket generation all functioning correctly.
passed_tests: Backend health check returns 'whatsapp_agent' type and version '4.0.0'
WhatsApp webhook verification with correct token returns challenge
Flight categorization algorithm returns PLUS_BAS, PLUS_RAPIDE, PREMIUM categories
Travelio pricing rule correctly applied: final_price = amadeus_price + 15 + (amadeus_price * 0.05)
EUR to XOF conversion uses correct rate 655.957
Flight selection '1' correctly selects PLUS_BAS category
Flight selection '2' correctly selects PLUS_RAPIDE category
Flight selection '3' correctly selects PREMIUM category
Payment confirmation with 'oui' transitions to awaiting_momo_approval
Cancel command 'annuler' resets session to idle state
Missing destination prompts user for destination (awaiting_destination state)
Missing date prompts user for date (awaiting_date state)
Intent parsing extracts destinations from French messages
Intent parsing extracts destinations from English messages
Welcome message processing with 'bonjour' command
Travel request processing transitions to awaiting_flight_selection
PDF ticket generation in /app/backend/tickets/ folder
PDF ticket download via /api/tickets/{filename} endpoint
Session management and state transitions working correctly
Mock Amadeus API integration with is_demo=true flag
Mock MoMo payment with SIM- prefixed references

success_percentage.frontend: N/A - WhatsApp-only agent with no web frontend
